statement: In every magma, Equation 1799 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * z) * z)`) implies Equation 479 (`x = y * (x * (y * (z * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0734
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z z) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op x (op y (op z x))))
